description_long: This is a single-bladed axe with a robust, dark metallic head and a pronounced curved edge, featuring a slightly bearded blade profile. The blade is securely mounted onto a wooden handle, which is wrapped with a textured grip material, likely leather or cord, for improved handling. The handle itself is gently curved, enhancing ergonomic use, and tapers slightly towards the end, which is capped with a darker material. The mounting of the blade appears traditional, with visible wedging at the top of the handle. The axe shows signs of wear, suggesting it is a functional tool rather than purely decorative. No visible markings or branding are present on the blade or handle.
description: A robust, single-bladed axe with a dark metal head and a curved, textured wooden handle wrapped for grip. The blade is bearded and traditionally mounted, with no visible markings.
description_view_0: The left side of the axe reveals the full bearded blade profile and the textured, curved wooden handle with a dark end cap.
description_view_1: A direct top-down view showing the narrow edge of the blade and the full length of the handle, highlighting the wedged mounting.
description_view_2: The right side displays the opposite face of the blade and handle, mirroring the bearded edge and grip wrapping.
description_view_3: A direct bottom-up view focusing on the handle's length and the mounting of the blade, with the end cap clearly visible.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle, oval cross-section, wrapped with textured grip material, dark end cap, ergonomic and traditional style.
attribute_blade_design: Single bearded blade, wide curved edge, pronounced beard, flat poll, no visible decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with visible wedge at the top of the handle.
